stage1.prompt: 选出 active 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adj. 忙碌的；活跃的
learn.example: She is very active in school activities.

stage1.prompt: 选出 bored 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adj. 厌倦的；烦闷的（boring 指事物无聊，bored 指人感到无聊）
learn.example: I felt bored because the class was too slow.

stage1.prompt: 选出"聪明的；机敏的"的英文

learn.meaning: adj. 聪明的；机敏的（= clever）
learn.example: Tom is smart — he always finds a good way.

stage1.q: 她很少用手机，总是专注于学习。
options: She seldom use her smartphone and always focuses on study.
She seldom uses her smartphone and always focuses on study.
She seldom uses her smartphone and always focus on study.
She seldom using her smartphone and always focuses on study.

learn.meaning: gram. 三单主语 She + seldom + 动词加 s
learn.example: She seldom uses social media.

stage1.prompt: 选出 bored 和 boring 的区别
stage1.q: The lesson was ___. I felt ___ after five minutes.

learn.meaning: boring 描述事物（令人无聊），bored 描述人（感到无聊）
learn.example: The film was boring. I was bored.

stage1.prompt: 选出 seldom 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adv. 不常；很少（= rarely）
learn.example: He seldom watches TV — he prefers reading.

stage1.q: My grandfather ___ goes to the park. He goes almost every day.

learn.meaning: adv. 经常——「几乎每天」说明频率很高，用 often
learn.example: He often goes to the park.

stage1.prompt: 选出 strict 的正确搭配
stage1.q: Our teacher is ___ about being on time.

learn.meaning: phr. 对（某事）要求严格（about + 事情）
learn.example: She is strict about homework quality.

stage1.prompt: 选出 seldom 在句中的正确位置

learn.meaning: gram. seldom 是频率副词，放在行为动词前
learn.example: She seldom eats junk food.

options: He is seldom late for school.
He seldom is late for school.
He is late seldom for school.
Seldom he is late for school.

learn.meaning: gram. seldom 在 be 动词后（is/are/was/were）
learn.example: He is seldom late. She is seldom bored.

stage1.prompt: 选出 cheerful 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adj. 开朗的；高兴的
learn.example: She is always cheerful and makes everyone happy.

stage1.q: 他开朗、积极，从不感到无聊。
options: He is cheerful, active and never feels boring.
He is cheerful, active and never feel bored.
He cheerful, active and never feels bored.
He is cheerful, active and never feels bored.

learn.meaning: gram. feel + 形容词；人感到无聊用 bored（不是 boring）
learn.example: He never feels bored because he is always active.

stage2.prompt: 选出 characteristic 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 特点；品质（= feature）
learn.example: Patience is one of her best characteristics.

stage2.prompt: 选出 advice 的正确用法

learn.meaning: gram. advice 是不可数名词，用 some/a piece of，不用 an/many
learn.example: some advice, a piece of advice (NOT: an advice)

stage2.q: 我父亲在建筑工地工作，他很少早回家。
options: My father works at a building site and seldom come home early.
My father work at a building site and seldom comes home early.
My father works at a building site and seldom comes home early.
My father works at a building sites and seldom comes home early.

learn.meaning: gram. 三单主语用 works 和 comes；site 这里单数
learn.example: He works at a site and seldom rests.

learn.meaning: n. 亲戚；亲属
learn.example: We visited our relatives during the holiday.

stage2.prompt: 选出 competition 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 比赛；竞赛
learn.example: She won first place in the English competition.

stage2.prompt: 选出 community 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 社区；社会群体
learn.example: She volunteers to help the local community.

stage2.q: She has a great ___ — she is kind, funny and generous.

learn.meaning: n. 性格——列举了性格特点，所以填 personality
learn.example: A great personality makes a great friend.

stage2.prompt: 选出 site 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 建筑工地；地点（website 网站）
learn.example: My father works at a building site.

stage2.prompt: 选出 personality 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 性格；个性
learn.example: She has a warm and friendly personality.

stage2.prompt: 选出 attention 的正确搭配

learn.meaning: phr. 注意；专心（pay attention to 固定搭配）
learn.example: Pay attention to the teacher in class.

stage2.prompt: 选出 advice 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 建议（不可数！不说 an advice / advices）
learn.example: She gave me some useful advice.

stage2.prompt: 选出 uniform 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 制服；校服
learn.example: We wear a school uniform every day.

stage3.q: 无论你在哪里，我都会鼓励你。
options: Wherever you are, I will encouraging you.
Wherever you are, I will encourage you.
Wherever are you, I will encourage you.
Wherever you are, I encourage you will.

learn.meaning: gram. wherever 引导地点状语从句，主句正常语序
learn.example: Wherever you go, I'll support you.

stage3.prompt: 选出 medical 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adj. 医学的；医疗的（medicine n. 医学）
learn.example: She wants to have a medical career.

stage3.q: 我爷爷退休后，很快就开始在社区做志愿者。
options: After my grandfather retired, he soon started volunteering in the community.
After my grandfather retire, he soon started volunteering in the community.
After my grandfather retired, he soon start volunteering in the community.
After my grandfather retired, he soon started volunteer in the community.

learn.meaning: gram. 从句过去时 retired；start + V-ing 表开始做
learn.example: After he retired, he started volunteering.

stage3.q: You should use your smartphone ___, not just for games.

learn.meaning: adv. 明智地——手机要用得明智，不能只玩游戏
learn.example: Use your time wisely.

stage3.prompt: 选出 retire 的中文意思

learn.meaning: v.（令）退休；退职
learn.example: My grandfather retired at the age of 60.

learn.meaning: adj. 在线的　adv. 在线地
learn.example: We have online classes when it rains heavily.

stage3.prompt: 选出 encourage 的中文意思

learn.meaning: v. 鼓励；激励
learn.example: My teacher encourages me to speak English every day.

stage3.prompt: 选出 encourage 的正确形式
stage3.q: My mum always ___ me to read more books.

learn.meaning: gram. 主语 My mum 是三单，动词加 -es
learn.example: She encourages me every day.

stage3.prompt: 选出 wisely 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adv. 聪明地；明智地（wise adj. 明智的 + ly）
learn.example: She used her time wisely and finished early.

stage3.prompt: 选出 narrow 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adj. 狭窄的；窄小的（反义 wide 宽的）
learn.example: The road near the site is very narrow.

stage3.prompt: 选出 wherever 的中文意思

learn.meaning: conj. 无论在哪里；各处
learn.example: Wherever you go, I will support you.

stage3.prompt: 选出 shower 在句中的意思
stage3.q: I always take a shower before school.

learn.meaning: n. 淋浴（take a shower 洗澡）　也指阵雨
learn.example: I take a shower every morning.

stage4.q: 在未来，我想成为一名医生，帮助社区里的人。
options: In the future, I want to be doctor and help people in the community.
In future, I want to be a doctor and help people in the community.
In the future, I want to be a doctor and help people in the community.
In the future, I want to be a doctor and helping people in the community.

learn.meaning: gram. 固定表达 in the future，the 不可省略
learn.example: In the future, robots may do our work.

stage4.prompt: 选出 used to 的正确用法
stage4.q: My dad ___ smoke, but he stopped five years ago.

learn.meaning: gram. used to 后接动词原形（不是 V-ing）
learn.example: He used to smoke. She used to live here.

stage4.prompt: 选出 give up 的中文意思

learn.meaning: phr. 放弃；认输（give up + V-ing 放弃做某事）
learn.example: Never give up your dreams!

stage4.q: 我父母对我用手机很担心，所以他们对此很严格。
options: My parents worried about my smartphone use, so they strict about it.
My parents are worried about my smartphone use, so they are strict with it.
My parents are worried about my smartphone use, so they are strict about it.
My parents are worry about my smartphone use, so they are strict about it.

learn.word: are worried about / are strict about
learn.meaning: gram. 两个 be + 形容词结构平行；about 不换成 with
learn.example: They are worried about it and strict about it.

stage4.prompt: 选出 give up 的正确形式
stage4.q: She decided to ___ playing video games.

learn.meaning: gram. give up 后接动名词（V-ing），不接 to do
learn.example: She gave up playing games. He gave up smoking.

stage4.q: My parents are always ___ my health.

learn.meaning: phr. 担心……（worried 是形容词，前加 be 动词）
learn.example: She is worried about the exam.

stage4.prompt: 选出 used to 的中文意思

learn.meaning: phr. 曾经（表示过去的习惯，现在已改变）
learn.example: I used to be shy, but now I'm confident.

stage4.q: My teacher is very ___ about our handwriting.

learn.meaning: phr. 对……严格（strict 后接 about + 名词/V-ing）
learn.example: She is strict about punctuality.

options: I used to afraid of speaking English.
I was used to afraid of speaking English.
I am used to afraid of speaking English.
I used to be afraid of speaking English.

learn.meaning: gram. used to + be（形容词做表语时需要 be）
learn.example: I used to be shy. She used to be active.

stage4.q: 他过去很少锻炼，但现在他每天都去健身房。
options: He used to seldom exercise, but now he go to the gym every day.
He use to seldom exercise, but now he goes to the gym every day.
He used to seldom exercised, but now he goes to the gym every day.
He used to seldom exercise, but now he goes to the gym every day.

learn.meaning: gram. used to 后接动词原形（exercise，不是 exercised）
learn.example: He used to seldom exercise.

stage4.prompt: 选出 in the future 的中文意思

learn.meaning: phr. 在未来；将来（表示将来时间）
learn.example: I want to be a doctor in the future.

stage4.prompt: 选出 used to 的否定形式
stage4.q: He ___ like vegetables when he was young.

learn.meaning: gram. used to 否定：didn't use to + 动词原形（use 不加 d）
learn.example: He didn't use to like vegetables.

stage5.q: 他曾经对学英语不感兴趣，但现在他在比赛中表现很聪明。
options: He used to be uninterested in English, but now he performs wisely in competitions.
He used to uninterested in English, but now he performs wisely in competitions.
He used to be uninterested in English, but now he perform wisely in competitions.
He used to be uninterested in English, but now he performs wise in competitions.

learn.meaning: gram. used to be（形容词前加 be）；perform + adv. 副词修饰动词
learn.example: He used to be shy but now performs confidently.

stage5.prompt: 选出 topic 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 话题；标题
learn.example: The topic of today's class is personality.

stage5.q: 无论你身在何处，都不应该放弃。
options: Wherever you are, you shouldn't give up.
Wherever you are, you shouldn't give up to.
Wherever are you, you shouldn't give up.
Wherever you are, you shouldn't giving up.

learn.meaning: gram. wherever 引导从句，主句正常；give up 后不加 to
learn.example: Wherever you are, never give up.

stage5.prompt: 选出 be worried about 的正确形式
stage5.q: Why ___ you worried about the competition?

learn.meaning: gram. worried 是形容词，疑问句用 be 动词（are/is/was）提前
learn.example: Are you worried about the exam?

stage5.q: 我的父亲在建筑工地上认真工作，他用智慧和努力养活了整个家庭。
options: My father works hard at the building site and support the whole family with wisdom and hard work.
My father work hard at the building site and supports the whole family with wisdom and hard work.
My father works hard at building site and supports the whole family with wisdom and hard work.
My father works hard at the building site and supports the whole family with wisdom and hard work.

learn.meaning: gram. 三单用 works 和 supports；the 不可省略
learn.example: He works at the site and supports us all.

stage5.q: She ___ eats fried food — she prefers healthy meals.

learn.meaning: adv. 很少——她喜欢健康饮食，所以很少吃炸食
learn.example: She seldom eats fried food.

stage5.prompt: 选出 smart 的派生词关系
stage5.q: She acted very ___ in the competition.

learn.meaning: gram. 修饰动词 acted 用副词 smartly（smart + ly）
learn.example: She acted smartly and won first place.

stage5.prompt: 选出 advice 的正确用法（数量表达）
stage5.q: My teacher gave me two ___ of advice.

learn.meaning: gram. advice 不可数，数量用 a piece of / two pieces of
learn.example: She gave me two pieces of useful advice.

stage5.q: She has a lot of great ___, like being kind and honest.

learn.meaning: n. 特点；品质（这里列举多个，用复数）
learn.example: Kindness and honesty are great characteristics.

stage5.q: 她过去很害羞，但现在她活跃，而且经常参加比赛。
options: She used to be shy, but now she active and often joins competitions.
She used to shy, but now she is active and often joins competitions.
She used to be shy, but now she is active and often joins competitions.
She used to be shy, but now she is active and often join competitions.

learn.word: used to be / is active / joins
learn.meaning: gram. 三个时态：used to be（过去），is（现在），joins（三单）
learn.example: She used to be shy but now she is confident.

stage5.q: 我们应该聪明地使用智能手机，而不是整天刷社交媒体。
options: We should wisely use smartphones, not spend all day on social media.
We should use smartphones wisely, not spending all day on social media.
We should use smartphones wisely, not spend all day on social media.
We should use smartphones wisely, not to spend all day on social media.

learn.meaning: gram. not + 动词原形（与 use 平行；not to do 不用在此）
learn.example: Use time wisely, not waste it.

stage5.prompt: 选出 future 的正确用法
stage5.q: ___ the future, she wants to work in a medical field.

learn.meaning: gram. 表达将来时间用 in the future（不用 at/on/for）
learn.example: In the future, I hope to help the community.
